title: Live Runs
cronHelp: Five fields: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week
description: Uses the shared chat-style run surface from issue activity.
empty: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
projectPausedNotice: Project execution is paused. New work in this project will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
scopePausedNotice: This scope is paused. New heartbeats will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
invalidNonNegativeAmount: Enter a valid non-negative dollar amount.
spendingReached: Spending reached {observed} against a limit of {limit}.

selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.

reason.pendingMigrations: pending migrations need a fresh boot

waitingForLiveRuns: Waiting for {count} live run{suffix} to finish

restartInstructionAfterCommand: after the active work is safe to interrupt
name: Name
confirmedDescription: Requesting agent was notified to review this approval and linked issues.
linkedIssuesHint: Linked issues remain open until the requesting agent follows up and closes them.
resolveBudgetPrefix: Resolve this budget stop from the budget controls on
deleteDisapprovedAgentConfirm: Delete this disapproved agent? This cannot be undone.
companySkillsDescription: Optional skills from the company library. Built-in Paperclip runtime skills are added automatically.
noCompanySkills: No optional company skills installed yet.
recommendation: We recommend letting your CEO handle agent setup. They know the org structure and can configure reporting, permissions, and adapters.
askCeo: Ask the CEO to create a new agent
advancedDescription: Choose your adapter type for advanced setup.
mac.step2: Hold Option and right-click the folder.
mac.step4: Paste the result into the path input.
mac.tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, press Enter, then run pwd to see the full path.
windows.step1: Find the folder in File Explorer.
windows.step2: Hold Shift and right-click the folder.
windows.tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select Copy as path.
linux.step1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
linux.step2: Run pwd to print the full path.
linux.step3: Copy the output and paste it here.
linux.tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.
windows.step4: Paste the result into the path input.
terminal.step3: Copy the output and paste it into the path input.
companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
requireBoardApprovalLabel: Require board approval for new hires
requireBoardApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
feedbackSharingLabel: Allow sharing voted AI outputs with Paperclip Labs
feedbackSharingHint: Only AI-generated outputs you explicitly vote on are eligible for feedback sharing.
feedbackSharingDescription: Votes are always saved locally. This setting controls whether voted AI outputs may also be marked for sharing with Paperclip Labs.
invitesDescription: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
invitesHint: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.
packagesMovedPrefix: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the
archiveDescription: Archive this project to hide it from the sidebar and project selectors.
selectFilePreview: Select a file to preview its contents.
binaryPreviewUnavailable: Binary asset preview is not available for this file type.
sourceSectionDescription: Choose a GitHub repo or upload a local Paperclip zip package.
localZipHelp: Upload a .zip exported directly from Paperclip. Re-zipped archives created by Finder, Explorer, or other zip tools may not import correctly.
githubUrlHint: Repo tree path or blob URL to COMPANY.md (e.g. github.com/owner/repo/tree/main/company).
targetHint: Import into this company or create a new one.
newCompanyNameHint: Optional override. Leave blank to use the package name.
collisionStrategyHint: Board imports can rename, skip, or replace matching company content.
emptyZip: No package files were found in the selected zip archive.
pendingApproval: This agent is pending board approval and cannot be invoked yet.
deleteConfirmation: Delete this company and all its data? This cannot be undone.
selectSkill: Select a skill to inspect its files.
removeDisabledReason: Detach this skill from all agents before removing it.
skillCreatedBody: {name} is now editable in the Paperclip workspace.
saveFailedBody: Paperclip could not save the routine.
updateFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the routine.
skillRemovedBody: {name} was removed from the company skill library.
deleteDialogDescription: Remove this skill from the company library. If any agents still use it, removal will be blocked until it is detached.
deleteDialogAboutToRemoveGeneric: You are about to remove this skill.
deleteDialogDetachNotice: Detach this skill from all agents to enable removal.
addSkillSourceDescription: Paste a local path, GitHub URL, or `skills.sh` command into the field first.
browseSkillsShDescription: Find install commands and paste one here.
searchGithubDescription: Look for repositories with `SKILL.md`, then paste the repo URL here.
sourceInputPlaceholder: Paste path, GitHub URL, or skills.sh command
detectedHint: Detected from `{{name}}` placeholders in the routine title and instructions.
promptEachRun: Prompt the user for this value before each manual run.
label: Label
hint: Use `{{variable_name}}` placeholders in the instructions to prompt for inputs when the routine runs.
sameRevision: Both sides are the same revision.
searchCurrentPage: Search current page or quick search
footer: Press {escapeKey} to close · Shortcuts are disabled in text fields
defaultAgentRequired: Default agent required for this run.
missingManager: Saved manager is missing from this company. Choose a new manager or clear.
freshWorkspaceHint: A fresh isolated workspace will be created when this issue runs.
reuseWorkspaceHint: This issue will reuse an existing workspace when it runs.
projectDefaultHint: This issue will use the project default workspace configuration when it runs.
installDialogDescription: Enter the npm package name of the plugin you wish to install.
alphaDescription: The plugin runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.
noExamples: No bundled example plugins were found in this checkout.
noInstalledPluginsDescription: Install a plugin to extend functionality.
uninstallDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to uninstall {name}? This action cannot be undone.
errorSummaryFallback: Plugin entered an error state without a stored error message.
duplicateRoute: Multiple plugins declare the route {route}. Use the plugin-id route until the conflict is resolved.
noSettingsRequired: This plugin does not require any settings.
runtimeDashboardDescription: Worker process, scheduled jobs, and webhook deliveries
runtimeUnavailable: Runtime diagnostics are unavailable right now.
healthChecksReadyHint: Health checks run once the plugin is ready.
envHint: Applied to all runs for issues in this project. Project values override agent env on key conflicts.
codebaseHelp: Repo identifies the source of truth. Local folder is the default place agents write code.
additionalLegacyWorkspaces: Additional legacy workspace records exist on this project. Paperclip is using the primary workspace as the codebase view.
executionWorkspacesHelp: Project-owned defaults for isolated issue checkouts and execution workspace behavior.
enableIsolatedIssueCheckoutsHint: Let issues choose between the project's primary checkout and an isolated execution workspace.
defaultToIsolatedCheckout: New issues default to isolated checkout
defaultToIsolatedCheckoutHint: If disabled, new issues stay on the project's primary checkout unless someone opts in.
provisionTeardownHint: Provision runs inside the derived worktree before agent execution. Teardown is stored here for future cleanup flows.
unarchiveDescription: Unarchive this project to restore it in the sidebar and project selectors.
selectCompanyForSecrets: Select a company to create secrets
localFolderAbsolutePath: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
repoUrlInvalid: Repo must use a valid GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repo URL.
clearLocalFolderConfirm: Clear local folder from this workspace?
noServicesConfigured: No services are configured for this workspace.
noJobsConfigured: No one-shot jobs are configured for this execution workspace yet.
jobsAvailable: {count} job{suffix} available to run on demand.
independentControl: Each command can be controlled independently.
servicesDescription: Long-running commands that Paperclip can supervise for this workspace.
jobsDescription: One-shot commands that run now and exit when they finish.
untrackedServicesDescription: Running services that no longer match the current workspace command config.
missingCommand: This job is missing a command.
untrackedService: This runtime service no longer matches a configured workspace command.
sourceTypeDescription.localPath: A local path Paperclip can use directly.
sourceTypeDescription.nonGitPath: A local folder without git semantics.
sourceTypeDescription.gitRepo: A repo URL with optional refs and local checkout.
sourceTypeDescription.remoteManaged: A hosted workspace tracked by external reference.
runtimeServicesJsonMustBeObject: Runtime services JSON must be a JSON object.
remoteManagedRequiresRefOrRepo: Remote-managed workspaces require a remote workspace ref or repo URL.
workspaceRequiresPathOrRepo: Workspace requires at least one local path or repo URL.
localPathMustBeAbsolute: Local workspace path must be absolute.
repoUrlMustBeValid: Repo URL must be a valid URL.
primaryWorkspaceHint: This is the project's primary codebase workspace.
setupCommandHint: Runs when this workspace needs custom bootstrap
runtimeServicesJsonHint: Concrete workspace runtime settings for this execution workspace. Leave this inheriting unless you need a one-off override. If you are missing the right commands, ask your CEO to set them up for you.
attachedServicesHint: Shared services for this project workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
noRunningRuntimeServices: No runtime services are currently running for this execution workspace.
noRuntimeServiceDefault: No runtime-service default is configured for this workspace yet.
runtimeCommandsJsonMustBeObject: Workspace commands JSON must be a JSON object.
advancedRuntimeJsonDescription: Override the inherited workspace command model only when this execution workspace truly needs different service or job behavior.
workspaceCommandsJsonHint: Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.
workspaceCommandsDescription: Configure reusable services and one-shot jobs inherited by execution workspaces.
noServicesStartedYet: No services have been started for this execution workspace yet.
noWorkspaceCommandConfig: No workspace command config is defined for this execution workspace yet.
workspaceCommandsDisabledHint: Execution workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.
runtimeJsonMustBeObject: Workspace runtime JSON must be a JSON object.
descriptionExtended: These settings stay attached to the execution workspace so future runs can keep local paths, repo refs, provisioning, teardown, and runtime-service behavior in sync with the actual workspace being reused.
workspaceSettingsHint: Edit the concrete path, repo, branch, provisioning, teardown, and runtime overrides attached to this execution workspace.
provisionCommandHint: Runs when Paperclip prepares this execution workspace
teardownCommandHint: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
runtimeConfigSourceOverride: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.
runtimeConfigSourceInherited: This execution workspace is inheriting the project workspace runtime config.
runtimeConfigSourceNone: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
noRuntimeConfig: No runtime config is defined for this execution workspace yet.
noWorkspaceOperations: No workspace operations have been recorded yet.
failedToInspect: Failed to inspect workspace close readiness.
sharedWorkspaceReason: This is a shared workspace session. Archiving it removes this session record but keeps the underlying project workspace.
independentCheckoutReason: This execution workspace has its own checkout path and can be archived independently.
projectPrimaryReason: This execution workspace currently points at the project's primary workspace path.
disposableReason: This workspace is disposable and can be archived.
cleanupRetryNotice: Cleanup previously failed on this workspace. Retrying close will rerun the cleanup flow and update the workspace status if it succeeds.
unavailableDescription: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.
claimedDescription: This instance is now linked to your authenticated user.
signInRequiredDescription: Sign in or create an account before submitting a human join request.
approvedDescription: The Paperclip CLI can now finish authentication on the requesting machine.
restartDescription: Start the CLI auth flow again from your terminal to generate a new approval request.
updateFailed: Failed to update CLI auth challenge
instanceAdminRequired: This challenge requires instance-admin access. Sign in with an instance admin account to approve it.
bootstrapCompleteDescription: The first instance admin is now configured. You can continue to the board.
joinSubmittedDescription: Your request is pending admin approval. You will not have access until approved.
activeInviteDescription: No instance admin exists yet. A bootstrap invite is already active. Check your Paperclip startup logs for the first admin invite URL, or run this command to rotate it:
noInviteDescription: No instance admin exists yet. Run this command in your Paperclip environment to generate the first admin invite URL:
addAgentDescription: Run onboarding again to add an agent and a starter task for this company.
createAnotherCompanyDescription: Run onboarding again to create another company and seed its first agent.
createFirstCompanyDescription: Get started by creating a company and your first agent.
defaultTaskTitle: Hire your first engineer and create a hiring plan
defaultTaskDescription:
You are the CEO. You set the direction for the company.

- hire a founding engineer
- write a hiring plan
- break the roadmap into concrete tasks and start delegating work
createOrSelectCompanyBeforeTesting: Create or select a company before testing adapter environment.
opencodeModelRequired: OpenCode requires an explicit model in provider/model format.
opencodeModelsStillLoading: OpenCode models are still loading. Please wait and try again.
noOpencodeModelsDiscovered: No OpenCode models discovered. Run `opencode models` and authenticate providers.
retryUnsetEnvStillFailing: Retried with {envVar} unset in adapter config, but the environment test is still failing.
companyDescription: This is the organization your agents will work for.
companyGoalPlaceholder: What is this company trying to achieve?
firstAgentDescription: Choose how this agent will run tasks.
adapterEnvironmentCheckDescription: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.
unsetAnthropicSuggestion: Claude failed while {envVar} is set. You can clear it in this CEO adapter config and retry the probe.
authHelpWithEnv: If auth fails, set {envVar} in env or run {command}.
loginHelp: If login is required, run {command} and retry.
taskDescription: Give your agent a small task to start with - a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.
taskDetailsPlaceholder: Add more detail about what the agent should do...
readyDescription: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.
localFolderMustBeAbsolute: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
repoMustBeValid: Repo must use a valid GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repo URL.
repoUrlHelp: Link a GitHub repository so agents can clone, read, and push code for this project.
localFolderHelp: Set an absolute path on this machine where local agents will read and write files for this project.
executionWorkspaceDescription: Control whether this issue runs in the shared workspace, a new isolated workspace, or an existing one.
parentWorkspaceWarning: Warning: this sub-issue will no longer use the parent issue workspace{workspace}.
failedToCreateIssueTryAgain: Failed to create issue. Try again.
stagedFilesCouldNotBeAdded: {count} staged file{suffix} could not be added.
selectDateRangePrompt: Select a start and end date to load data.

budgetUtilization: {percent}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.

byAgentDescription: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
byProjectDescription: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
noFinanceEventsWithHint: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.

activeIncidentsSubtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
pendingApprovalsSubtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
activeIncidentsDescription: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
agentBudgetsDescription: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
projectBudgetsDescription: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.
noBudgetPoliciesYet: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.
noCostEventsInPeriod: No cost events in this period.

byBillerDescription: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.

statusDescription: Issue state chip on the left edge.
projectDescription: Linked project pill with its color.
workspaceDescription: Execution or project workspace used for the issue.
reinstallDescription: This will pull the latest version of {packageName} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.
installExternalAdapterDescription: Add an adapter from npm or a local path. The adapter package must export createServerAdapter().
acceptsPlatformPaths: Accepts Linux, WSL, and Windows paths. Windows paths are auto-converted.
alphaNoticeBody: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change. Use the power icon to hide adapters from agent menus without removing them.
installAdapterPackageHint: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
removeAdapterDescription: Are you sure you want to remove the {type} adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store.
removeAdapterNpmCleanup: npm packages will be cleaned up from disk.

boardMutationRequiresTrustedOrigin: Board mutation requires trusted browser origin
userPreferencesUnavailable: User preferences are unavailable for this session
chooseColumns: Choose which inbox columns stay visible
rendererErrorTitle: Chat renderer hit an internal state error.
rendererErrorDescription: Showing a safe fallback transcript instead of crashing the issues page.
failedToLoadContent: Rich editor failed to load content
richEditorUnavailable: Rich editor unavailable for this markdown. Showing raw source instead.
feedbackPreferenceDescription: Choose whether voted AI outputs can be shared with Paperclip Labs. This answer becomes the default for future thumbs up and thumbs down votes.
feedbackVoteAlwaysLocal: This vote is always saved locally.
feedbackPreferenceDetails: Choose Always allow to share this vote and future voted AI outputs. Choose Don't allow to keep this vote and future votes local.
feedbackPreferenceLater: You can change this later in Instance Settings > General.
emptyConversation: This issue conversation is empty. Start with a message below.
interruptRequestedDescription: The active run is stopping so queued comments can continue next.
unableToInterruptRun: Unable to interrupt the active run
feedbackSavedFutureShare: Feedback saved. Future votes will share
feedbackSavedFutureLocal: Feedback saved. Future votes will stay local
unableToCancelQueuedComment: Unable to cancel the queued comment
queuedCommentRestored: The queued message was restored to the composer.
unableToArchiveFromInbox: Unable to archive this issue from the inbox
selectCompanyToCreateSecrets: Select a company before creating secrets.
selectCompanyToUploadImages: Select a company to upload images
selectCompanyToDetectModel: Select a company before detecting a model.
selectCompanyToTestEnvironment: Select a company before testing the adapter environment.
capabilitiesPlaceholder: Describe what this agent is responsible for.
promptTemplatePlaceholder: Add reusable instructions for every run.
promptTemplateWarning: Prompt templates are shared across runs. Keep them reusable and avoid issue-specific details.
noModelDetectedSelectManually: No model was detected yet. Select one manually if needed.
codexMinimalSearchWarning: Minimal reasoning effort may limit Codex search quality.
bootstrapPromptLegacyWarning: This legacy bootstrap prompt is still configured and may affect older runs.
searchModelsCreate: Search or paste a model ID...
markAllAsReadConfirmDescription: This will mark {count} unread item{suffix} as read.
emptySearch: No inbox items match your search.
emptyFiltered: No inbox items match these filters.
concurrencyCoalesceDescription: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
concurrencyAlwaysEnqueueDescription: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
concurrencySkipDescription: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.
catchUpSkipDescription: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
catchUpEnqueueDescription: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
signingModeBearerDescription: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
signingModeHmacDescription: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.
signingModeGithubDescription: Accept GitHub-style X-Hub-Signature-256 header (HMAC over raw body, no timestamp).
signingModeNoneDescription: No authentication. The webhook URL itself acts as a shared secret.
runFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
addTriggerFailedBody: Paperclip could not create the trigger.
triggerSavedBody: The routine cadence update was saved.
updateTriggerFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the trigger.
deleteTriggerFailedBody: Paperclip could not delete the trigger.
rotateSecretFailedBody: Paperclip could not rotate the webhook secret.
defaultAgentRequiredBody: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.
saveSecretNow: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.
defaultAgentRequiredBanner: Default agent required. This routine can stay as a draft and still run manually, but automation stays paused until you assign a default agent.
createdBodyLiveWorkflow: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
createdBodyDraft: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.
newRoutineDescription: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.
advancedDeliveryDescription: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
afterCreationHint: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.
newKeyHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _, and start with a letter or number.
requiredKeyAndBody: Document key and body are required
keyValidationError: Document key must start with a letter or number and use only lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _.
remoteChangedReloadFailed: Document changed remotely and the latest version could not be loaded
saveOrCancelBeforeHistory: Save or cancel your local changes before viewing an older revision.
viewingRevisionBody: This is a historical preview. Restoring it creates a new latest revision and keeps history append-only.
outOfDateBody: This document changed while you were editing. Your local draft is preserved and autosave is paused.
deleteConfirm: Delete this document? This cannot be undone.
taskAssignHintCreator: Enabled automatically while this agent can create new agents.
taskAssignHintGrant: Enabled via explicit company permission grant.
canCreateAgentsDescription: Lets this agent create or hire agents and implicitly assign tasks.
loadWorkspaceLogFailed: Failed to load workspace operation log
instructionsBundlesOnlyLocal: Instructions bundles are only available for local adapters.
modeTooltip: Managed: Paperclip stores and serves the instructions bundle. External: you provide a path on disk where the instructions live.
rootPathTooltip: The absolute directory on disk where the instructions bundle lives. In managed mode this is set by Paperclip automatically.
entryFileTooltip: The main file the agent reads first when loading instructions. Defaults to AGENTS.md.
virtualFileTooltip: Legacy inline prompt - this deprecated virtual file preserves the old promptTemplate content
openClawSkillsUnsupported: Paperclip cannot manage OpenClaw skills here. Visit your OpenClaw instance to manage this agent's skills.
skillsUnsupported: Paperclip cannot manage skills for this adapter yet. Manage them in the adapter directly.
manageSkillsInAdapter: Manage skills in the adapter directly.
importSkillsFirst: Import skills into the company library first, then attach them here.
unmanagedSkillsTitle: ({count}) User-installed skills, not managed by Paperclip
requestedSkillsMissing: Requested skills missing from the company library
clearSessionsConfirm: Clear session for {count} issue{suffix} touched by this run?
noPersistedTranscript: No persisted transcript for this run.
apiKeyCreated: API key created - copy it now, it will not be shown again.
createApiKeyDescription: API keys allow this agent to authenticate calls to the Paperclip server.
createSecretFromCurrentValue: Create secret from current plain value
storeValueAsSecret: Store value as secret and replace with reference
runtimeInjectedHint: PAPERCLIP_* variables are injected automatically at runtime.
secretProviderDescription: This secret is stored securely via the Paperclip secret provider.
